{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/197543882?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/0xmrma", "id": 197543882, "login": "0xmrma", "node_id": "U_kgDOC8ZHyg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xmrma", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46552", "cvss": {"score": 5.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary

Shared-base sessions were granted the same base-member capabilities as authenticated viewers. Using only the shared-base UUID (`xc-shared-base-id`), an attacker could enumerate base members and invite an arbitrary email into the base as a real member. The invited user could then redeem the invite via the normal signup flow and retain authenticated access even after the owner revoked the shared link.

### Details

Shared-base sessions were mapped to `ProjectRoles.VIEWER` in `packages/nocodb/src/strategies/base-view.strategy/base-view.strategy.ts`, and `packages/nocodb/src/utils/acl.ts` granted `baseUserList` and `userInvite` to that role. The shared frontend (`packages/nc-gui/composables/useApi/interceptors.ts`) deliberately removed auth headers in favour of the shared-base header, but the ACL middleware did not distinguish shared sessions from genuine viewers.

The end-to-end chain:

- `GET /api/v2/meta/bases/:baseId/users` returned the member list to shared-base callers (`@Acl('baseUserList')`).
- `POST /api/v2/meta/bases/:baseId/users` accepted an invite from shared-base callers (`@Acl('userInvite')`); `base-users.service.ts` inserted a real `nc_users_v2` row with `invite_token` and a `nc_base_users_v2` row for the target base, with `invited_by = null`.
- The invited account redeemed the invite through the normal signup path (`users.service.ts`), gaining a persistent JWT scoped to the base.
- Revoking the shared link did not affect the redeemed account.

### Impact

- Confidentiality: shared-base link exposes member email addresses.
- Integrity: shared-base link can mutate base ACL state by creating new members.
- Persistence: link-based access converts into durable authenticated access that survives revocation of the share.

### Credit

This issue was reported by [@0xmrma](https://github.com/0xmrma).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00296, "percentile": 0.215}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-chqv-vrj7-qffp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T20:35:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-chqv-vrj7-qffp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-chqv-vrj7-qffp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46552"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T20:35:56Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-chqv-vrj7-qffp", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-chqv-vrj7-qffp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-chqv-vrj7-qffp", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Shared-base link access can invite arbitrary users as persistent base members", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T20:35:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-chqv-vrj7-qffp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.301.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Shared-base link access can invite arbitrary users as persistent base members
